functions.title: Guide Book #21
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #21§r
§lEnchanted Flying Book§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: §pUncommon§r
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Construct, Object, Magical, Aerial.
•§lSummon by§r: Book Curserer.
•§lHealth§r: 16

•§lFly speed§r: 0.12
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Book and Quill
•§lPossible drops§r: Random Enchanted Book, XP Orbs.
•§rMelee attack damage§r: 2
•Can be sealed by using a Sealing Bookmark.
•Can be transformed into Curse Enchantment Book by using a Cursed Eye.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Enchanted Flying Books carry powerful spells within their pages. Often summoned by Book Curserers, they are living tomes of knowledge — unpredictable and rare, but highly sought for the enchanted secrets they hold.
